final:
// // This module implements an 8-bit multiplier with a reset functionality. When reset is HIGH, the output is set to zero. Otherwise, it outputs the product of inputs a and b, resulting in a 16-bit value.
module top_module(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input reset,
    output reg [15:0] out
);always @(*) begin
        if (reset == 0) begin
            out <= 0;
        end
        else begin
            out <= a * b;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an 8-bit multiplier with a reset functionality. When reset is HIGH, the output is set to zero. Otherwise, it outputs the product of inputs a and b, resulting in a 16-bit value.
